hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '(^|/)(pnpm-lock\.yaml|next-env\.d\.ts)$' && { echo 'Blocked: do not edit lockfile or generated type declarations. Use pnpm commands instead.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|css)$' && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format || exit 0
